backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the SurgiCase backend, implementing access-controlled CRUD operations for veterinary cases and user profiles, with role-based authorization via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two implemented features—fixing the CalendarCaseCard click handler navigation and adding owner name/presenting complaint display—to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role and recent changes in the SurgiCase React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SurgiCase PWA, setting up the root div, viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, and app icons for iOS and Android.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for SurgiCase defining app name, display mode, theme colors, and icon assets at 192×192 and 512×512 sizes.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker that caches static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and serves cached responses for GET requests while skipping ICP/Dfinity canister calls.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, page routing between dashboard and cases, and a targetCaseId state used to scroll/highlight a specific case card after navigating from the dashboard.
frontend/src/components/Auth/LoginPage.t: Login page component that renders the SurgiCase branding and an Internet Identity login button with loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/Auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation before calling an `onComplete` callback.
frontend/src/components/Cases/CaseCard.t: Displays a single veterinary case as a card with editable fields (pet name, owner, breed, etc.), species/sex badges, task toggle badges, and delete/click handlers.
The main cases list page that fetches, filters, sorts, and searches vet cases, and supports PDF export, CSV import/export, case deletion with a confirmation dialog, and scroll-to-highlight for a target case.
A toolbar component providing a text search input, filter pill buttons (all, complete, histo, imaging, labs, culture), and a sort toggle (oldest/newest).
frontend/src/components/Cases/NewCaseFor: A form for creating a new vet case with manual field entry, MRN-based autofill, and a quick-fill textarea that parses pasted or dictated text into form fields via `parseQuickFill`.
Renders a styled, optionally clickable badge for a single case task (e.g., labs, histo, imaging) with distinct colors and icons for completed vs. incomplete states.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Calend: A compact card component for displaying a veterinary case in a calendar view, showing pet name, MRN, species, sex, owner, presenting complaint, and toggleable task badges with tooltips.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard/Dashbo: The main dashboard page component that renders a weekly calendar grid of vet cases, supports week navigation, and allows task toggling directly from the calendar view.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Header.ts: A sticky top navigation header with the app logo, Dashboard/Cases nav links, a New Case button, optional CSV/PDF export actions, and a logout button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/shared/DateInput: A controlled date input component split into three separate MM, DD, and YYYY fields with auto-focus advancement, backspace navigation, and inline validation highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks (useGetCases, useGetCaseByMRN, useCreateCase, etc.) for fetching and mutating veterinary case data via an ICP actor, with type converters between frontend and backend representations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with a blue-focused clinical CSS variable palette, and defines reusable component utility classes like surgi-card, task-badge-base, and case-highlight animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pwa-init.ts: Registers a service worker at /sw.js on page load to enable PWA functionality, logging success or warning on failure.
frontend/src/types/case.ts: Defines core TypeScript types and interfaces for veterinary cases including Species, Sex, TaskKey, TaskStatus, and VetCase, plus helper constants and a utility to check task completion.
frontend/src/utils/csvUtils.ts: Provides utilities to export VetCase arrays to CSV strings or downloadable files, and to parse/import CSV text back into VetCase objects.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Offers date formatting, parsing, age calculation, and weekly calendar utilities (week start, week days, day header formatting, same-day and today checks).
frontend/src/utils/parseUtils.ts: Implements parseQuickFill to extract VetCase fields (MRN, dates, pet name, species, sex, etc.) from free-form text using regex patterns.
frontend/src/utils/pdfUtils.ts: Dynamically loads jsPDF from CDN and exports an array of VetCase objects into a formatted A4 PDF report with case details and task statuses.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for SurgiCase describing two pending fix requests: correcting Dashboard card navigation to the Cases page and displaying owner name and presenting complaint on each Dashboard card.
